item.title: Automated Wordpress Upgrades
item.description: One of my biggest pain points over the past few months has been keeping up with WordPress updates and performing upgrades/changes in maintenance windows which usually occur early in the morning (I’m not a morning person). Typically the solution here is for me to script out what I need to do, perform it on a test box, and then schedule it with at. Unfortunately WordPress would usually need some interactions on the web interface (click to finish a database upgrade or click to upgrade the network) after just simply replacing the files which I couldn’t script away, at least not with the tools I had at my disposal.

item.title: Contact Jamison
item.description: Email Say hello at hello@jamisonkissh.com PGP Key If you'd like to encrypt your message you may use the key below. -----BEGIN PGP PUBLIC KEY BLOCK----- Version: GnuPG v2 mQINBFbbIugBEACZcZ6GUtjiD+wNJaGE++My8JURbL+XB28TPSxjauVfMwNMIXhL ORyUPUG2lzDet2OkEzO+Qtonw1ni/k6p3eRtUXK+j9N+vBYDA1ned/+PexFa1QxG 5M+jcd7KZw+6dKO7lQPGpdPiyeoqLLziDUPTY93iXjixDOXjrY2NJb9VuxqQg398 CIeHge8pEAKlZC40okNZyjpPsi1yn0Y9wzHHEjQRYwxLXM2401WBG9Ldm8lPS1gP nHVMyBBLOHPxMdqXpxmHBvZtkcRFrNZBBNO6ZQ21/C0UpZmNLr2cBdUOl0p1nZmI ZOhoEyImV7nEzsq2FBG04JulhiM847MQiENSfb1S92jL2lyAnfKTgn0BzOBLJRNZ L3E3Rs11btiASPToYc30rzeJi98OgRhPuEu82VhXfR5slNb8WxXFTi3Gu6xZXFPP +CxIXqb9Jn1zmoafBeKbKzQJRBIbyJk8eMZZ1dggFr7i8txBhiHhP5Bs3qpVCyj/ bttTUQNXaRnEOjaulzLKjg+Gch4xg1cQIOLW0E5I2jmaYOT/rmVvyRyApXgfxtfy xq47J4H6bgE68PjAe8oF1zpGV9ybXmVbnSWjO2hr1j4PbyyIHDDVjB6QSorsZaxB lWBc+hmmckeR6HzgOJY+p9QRQC2zdhiieLw9lHueYbYpEMMkZSnRHdnoVQARAQAB tCBKYW1pc29uIEtpc3NoIDxqYWsxMTlAZ21haWwuY29tPokCOQQTAQgAIwUCVtsi 6AIbDwcLCQgHAwIBBhUIAgkKCwQWAgMBAh4BAheAAAoJENIIEkOsU+gXucIP/jIC 0iH/fKlHHsp0xKozyesT81/kmNTL19UBWw/90KTDlxCAddEDrviQKp8i0yFyTSv5 EKgmHKnXkskndEd7Ml08vaEWWtvSZQ43Y+wbOtRGQIb6waXHEqTs3QeE/NZ6l5OA gUExHxvgRgGDILXoxDNhYHjdCjk/BEi5QCKslFXY8JrckPbWXAJHY1b542OgN5qJ O7hKZLefecef2bFmh8Dk2esRotau+U5m2ZnUcyCQUS+ctpsKs5jIAwyQQU7U60wB 2zv1oBCVtUV8X2gpMq87Y0xxGf6aHIDNdKKsmS6ivcPuqTXLlKtpD9wrGSYCO+6q AV9gv0kzTX/mxYvdpPLRueqFjy39EncIX2s6Keo3790Q+QVOITPcWccN+wIGhDYd 4Nn8cbJXgulOGq1uYnGF7cFNs9Gknn38o6/1uT2yCV6YhgAXqnR6Vyuk/iCQz8UM +s+cvtCEIASqrS5I4dykKX68RATrLxQgUA0BNUQCzTRXzIPY2O3BZxY+G6s51frJ L3J5DaNOktYL5k0Il9Vf8lCpmHQMlRGs2UfByGa8LqK0TwzQttweHAKshgJUkH3S MdeIE0NKyb9fPee/gBHmv/3hBA2uLceVbuk4hNyMOkYK0E4oAHXbATvMA4c1XcHM XRjn41ZFlUf0qMLT5LQ1UgCqW0KXTSHFt9IyZ/QV =rDYQ -----END PGP PUBLIC KEY BLOCK-----
